assignment.name: vague
assignment.title: Make something cool with AI
assignment.description: Build a project that uses AI in some interesting way. The exact scope, audience, and form of the deliverable are up to you.

recommended_plan: Analysis or research project (using AI to uncover insights from data)
Public datasets (e.g., Kaggle, government data, social media)
Environmental/climate insights (e.g., carbon emissions patterns, deforestation trends, energy usage)
